title: Speculation International Alternate Titles for Q and Final
display_title: Speculation International Alternate Titles for Q and Final
wikitext:
[]: Speculation: International/Alternate Titles for Q and Final             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Mar 24, 2011 2:42 pm RMZX wrote: I don't think they have the title ready, the end of the Preview says "Evangelion: New Theatrical Edition Q". Which is the same as the Japanese. Lets just assume they meant for it to be 3.0 but didn't get confirmation from Khara about the international title.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Thu Mar 24, 2011 2:47 pm Kendrix wrote: I really DO hope we get another of those bracket titles. They are memetastic and it should really have some continuity, I think. Also, I want the last one to be called You will (not) survive. Badly. Oh well, maybe Anno has an even better idea... But... bracket titles. PLEASE.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Mar 24, 2011 2:51 pm TheFriskyIan wrote: Dude, you read my f***ing mind on what the last title should be. Maybe 3.0 could be something like 'You may (not) surrender" or something.

[]:             Quote Post by RMZX » Thu Mar 24, 2011 2:53 pm I've always wanted 3.0 to be something like "You will (not) Survive", Final should be "You must (not) understand". But that'll wait till Khara announces the title, or you know, gets closer to finishing it.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Mar 24, 2011 2:58 pm RMZX wrote: e "You must (not) understand"

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Thu Mar 24, 2011 3:06 pm Kendrix wrote: That was one of your jokes again, was it? ....I hope they do take their own work more serious than that.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Mar 24, 2011 3:09 pm TheFriskyIan wrote: Who else but Anno?! I bet he would make that title and be all like "Trollololololol You mad fan base?" -.-

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Thu Mar 24, 2011 3:10 pm Kendrix wrote: I'm... giving it up. Just give us Q already.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Mar 24, 2011 3:14 pm TheFriskyIan wrote: Don't ask about it, you just delayed it by another 6 months. The release of "Q" is to coincide with the rapture.

[]:             Quote Post by RMZX » Thu Mar 24, 2011 4:44 pm Kendrix wrote: That was one of your jokes again, was it? ....I hope they do take their own work more serious than that.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Thu Mar 24, 2011 4:45 pm yeah it sad. And sorry about getting off topic in the other thread.

[]:             Quote Post by DanAwful » Thu Mar 24, 2011 4:46 pm Hello, figured this would be a good topic to place my first post as it's neutral and non-threatening. I was thinking something along the lines of "You can [not] succeed" or "You will [not] succeed". I'm leaning toward the latter only because the word 'can' was used in the previous film. Another good one (at least I think so): You must [not] give up.

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Thu Mar 24, 2011 4:55 pm EVANGELION: 3.0 You Do (Not) Belong & EVANGELION: Final You Will (Not) Despair. Those are my guesses and I'm sticking to them.

[]:             Quote Post by DanAwful » Thu Mar 24, 2011 4:57 pm Shogo-Kun wrote: EVANGELION: 3.0 You Do (Not) Belong & EVANGELION: Final You Will (Not) Despair.

[]:             Quote Post by Sanctus Scorpius » Thu Mar 24, 2011 5:33 pm Evangelion Final: You Must (Not) Run Away Honestly, I would be surprised if that wasn't the title.

[]:             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Thu Mar 24, 2011 5:37 pm Evangelion Final You [will] be mad

[]:             Quote Post by Marduk » Thu Mar 24, 2011 5:39 pm I still support "Evangelion 3.00: You shall (not) pass" and "Evangelion Final: Your skill is (not) enough"

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Thu Mar 24, 2011 7:02 pm I still think the "You will (NOT) survive" title is the best for FINAL.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Mar 24, 2011 7:11 pm Evangelion: If You Build It They Will (Not) Come

[]:             Quote Post by theobject » Thu Mar 24, 2011 8:50 pm Evangelion: This Is (Not) the End I think You Will (Not) Survive should be for the fourth one, personally.
summary:

Which is the same as the Japanese. Lets just assume they meant for it to be 3.0 but didn't get confirmation from Khara about the international title.
